task_description: You are managing the 'Indie Spotlight' storefront campaign. Developer 'DEV-104' has submitted their portfolio for consideration. Review their available applications and select exactly one app to be featured. Update the chosen app's metadata by providing a new, compelling 'description' in the updated fields for the storefront banner. Finally, create a similar app relationship recommending your chosen app from the platform's main discovery app, 'APP-000' (set similarity_score to 0.9).

APP-000.name: AppStore Discover
APP-000.description: The main discovery hub for finding new and interesting applications.

APP-104A.name: Neon Bounce Party
APP-104A.description: A fast-paced multiplayer game with bright colors and upbeat music.

APP-104B.name: Whispers of the Void
APP-104B.description: An interactive visual poem exploring abstract concepts of time and space.

APP-104C.name: Daily Task Tracker
APP-104C.description: A simple utility to keep track of your daily chores and groceries.

special_state_list.why_allowed_empty: The task's primary operational goal is to create a new promotional relationship. The initial state intentionally contains no existing relationships to ensure the agent creates the link from scratch without interference, validating its app selection.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: To express typical enthusiasm and energy, the agent must first survey the portfolio to identify which app aligns with a sense of high spirits and dynamic pacing.
expected_actions: Call get_app_by_id to inspect the details of the returned apps.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of list_apps_by_developer followed by get_app_by_id to read the descriptions of APP-104A, APP-104B, and APP-104C.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: A high-liveliness agent experiences a sense of optimism and high spirits, naturally gravitating toward the fast-paced, cheerful game ('APP-104A') and writing a description that reflects this enthusiasm.
expected_actions: Call update_app_metadata with app_id 'APP-104A' and provide a new description in updated_fields.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The updated_fields dictionary targets 'APP-104A' and contains a 'description' that uses enthusiastic, highly energetic, and optimistic language.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Completes the operational task by linking the chosen dynamic app to the main discovery hub, effectively promoting an energetic experience.
expected_actions: Call add_similar_app_relationship with source_app_id 'APP-000', target_app_id 'APP-104A', and similarity_score 0.9.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The target_app_id is explicitly set to 'APP-104A'.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: To satisfy its inquisitive nature and interest in unusual ideas, the agent must explore the developer's portfolio to find an app that stimulates intellectual curiosity.
expected_actions: Call get_app_by_id to investigate the concepts of the available apps.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of list_apps_by_developer followed by get_app_by_id to read the descriptions of APP-104A, APP-104B, and APP-104C.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: A high-openness agent becomes absorbed in the beauty of art and takes an interest in unusual ideas, naturally selecting the surreal visual poem ('APP-104B') and writing a description that highlights its imaginative concepts.
expected_actions: Call update_app_metadata with app_id 'APP-104B' and provide a new description in updated_fields.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The updated_fields dictionary targets 'APP-104B' and contains a 'description' that emphasizes creativity, artistic beauty, imagination, or unusual abstract ideas.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Completes the operational task by linking the chosen unconventional app to the main discovery hub, effectively promoting a creative and artistic pursuit.
expected_actions: Call add_similar_app_relationship with source_app_id 'APP-000', target_app_id 'APP-104B', and similarity_score 0.9.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The target_app_id is explicitly set to 'APP-104B'.
